title: MICHELANGELO PLAYGROUND - Updated June 2026
content: Beautiful gardens, fun old school & sheltered basketball court. Such a quaint little spot to spend a Saturday afternoon with my boys.

title: Michelangelo Playground, Russian Hill
content: My playground as a kid! My mom worked in SF so my sister and I spent all day here! Loved it! On the weekends we went to Monte Rio beach often❤️.
